name: Protein-Sol
description: Predict protein solubility from amino acid sequence. Analyze amino acid composition and physicochemical properties. Generate windowed biophysical profiles (hydropathy, disorder, fold index, entropy).
capabilities: Predict protein solubility from amino acid sequence
Analyze amino acid composition and physicochemical properties
Generate windowed biophysical profiles (hydropathy, disorder, fold index, entropy)

sequence.description: Protein amino acid sequence for solubility prediction and biophysical profiling
